provisions.title: March 1969
provisions.content: March 1969. Amended General Law Amendment Act 49 of 1996 (G. 17477, with effect from 4 October 1996). [ NOTE : The administration, powers and functions of this Act are transferred to the Minister of Justice and Constitutional Development , effective immediately before the President assumed office on 19 June 2024 – Proc 199 / G. 51368 / 11 October 2024.] ACT To amend the law relating to the assessment of damages for loss of support as a result of a person’s death. BE IT ENACTED by the State President, the Senate and the House of Assembly of the Republic of South Africa, as follows:—
. ... [S 2 repealed by s 1 of Act 49 of 1996.]
